mapper.select: select valtext as label, valvalue as value, memo as memo from synlte.fieldcodeval where upper(codeid) = upper(#{codeId})
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO synlte.FIELDCODEVAL (CODEVALID, CODEID, VALTEXT, MEMO, VALVALUE, SORTINDEX, VALTEXTTITLE) values
( #{item.codeValId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.codeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.valText,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.valValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sortIndex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.valTextTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

if.test: mainClassify == 'dataorganizationclassify' and (primaryClassifyCode =='jzcodegasjzzfl01' or primaryClassifyCode =='jzcodegasjzzfl03' or primaryClassifyCode =='jzcodejzsjzzfl01' or primaryClassifyCode =='jzcodejzsjzzfl03')

select.if:
select value , label||'('||tableCount||')'as label from( select case when a.value is null then '中间表' else a.value end as value , case when a.label is null then '中间表' else a.label end as label , case when b.tableCount is null then 0 else b.tableCount end as tableCount from ( select distinct CODENAME as value, CODETEXT as label from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where PARCODEID = upper(#{primaryClassifyCode}) and CODENAME is not null ) a left join ( select SJEJFLCODENAME as codeId , count(*) as tableCount from classify_interface_all_date
primaryorganizationch = '中间表'
sjyjfl = upper(#{primaryClassifySecondCode})
group by SJEJFLCODENAME ) b on a.value = b.codeId) t1 order by value

if.test: mainClassify == 'dataorganizationclassify' and primaryClassifyCode !='jzcodegasjzzfl01' and primaryClassifyCode !='jzcodegasjzzfl03' and primaryClassifyCode !='jzcodejzsjzzfl01' and primaryClassifyCode !='jzcodejzsjzzfl03'

select.if:
select value , label||'('||tableCount||')'as label from( select case when a.value is null then '中间表' else a.value end as value , case when a.label is null then '中间表' else a.label end as label , case when b.tableCount is null then 0 else b.tableCount end as tableCount from ( select distinct CODENAME as value, CODETEXT as label from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where PARCODEID = upper(#{primaryClassifyCode}) and CODENAME is not null ) a left join ( select SJSJFLCODENAME as codeId , count(*) as tableCount from classify_interface_all_date
primaryorganizationch = '中间表'
sjyjfl = upper(#{primaryClassifySecondCode})
group by SJSJFLCODENAME ) b on a.value = b.codeId) t1 order by value

select value , label||'('||tableCount||')'as label from( select case when a.value is null then '中间表' else a.value end as value , case when a.label is null then '中间表' else a.label end as label , case when b.tableCount is null then 0 else b.tableCount end as tableCount from ( select distinct CODENAME as value, CODETEXT as label from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where upper(PARCODEID) = upper(#{primaryClassifyCode}) and CODEID is not null ) a LEFT join ( select SJLYEJCODENAME as codeId , count(*) as tableCount from classify_interface_all_date
primarydatasourcech = '中间表'
upper(sjlyyj) = upper(#{primaryClassifySecondCode})
group by SJLYEJCODENAME ) b on a.value = b.codeId) t1 order by value

mapper.select:
select value , label||'('||tableCount||')'as label from( select case when a.value is null then '中间表' else a.value end as value , case when a.label is null then '中间表' else a.label end as label , case when b.tableCount is null then 0 else b.tableCount end as tableCount from ( select distinct CODENAME as value, CODETEXT as label from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where PARCODEID = upper(#{primaryClassifyCode}) and CODENAME is not null ) a left join ( select SJSJFLCODENAME as codeId , count(*) as tableCount from classify_interface_all_date
primaryorganizationch = '中间表'
SJEJFLCODENAME = upper(#{primaryClassifySecondCode})
group by SJSJFLCODENAME ) b on a.value = b.codeId) t1 order by value

select CODEID as codeValId, PARCODEID as codeId, CODETEXT as valText, CODEID as valValue from synlte.fieldcode where PARCODEID = 'GACODE000414' union select CODEVALID as codeValId, CODEID as codeId, VALTEXT as valText, VALVALUE as valValue from synlte.fieldcodeval where codeid in (select codeid from synlte.fieldcode where PARCODEID = 'GACODE000414')
